name: Hard Sci-Fi
description: Realistic physics, near-future tech, scientific accuracy over space opera

entities.name: The Scientist-Astronaut
entities.description: Mission specialist with deep expertise. Professional, methodical, haunted by past mission failure.

entities.name: The AI / Ship Mind
entities.description: Not sentient but extremely sophisticated. Manages ship systems. May develop emergent behavior.

entities.name: The Corporate Liaison
entities.description: Represents funding entity. Risk-averse, deadline-driven. Not villain - just different priorities.

attributes.conflict: safety vs schedule / profit vs science

entities.name: The Research Vessel
entities.description: Hard-science spacecraft. Rotating habitat for gravity. Nuclear thermal propulsion. No artificial gravity magic.

attributes.propulsion: nuclear thermal / ion drive / fusion torch

entities.name: Target Celestial Body
entities.description: Moon of gas giant / asteroid / Mars / exoplanet. Scientifically valuable. Hostile environment.

attributes.resources: water ice / rare earths / helium-3 / scientific data

plot_threads.title: The Anomaly
plot_threads.description: Unexpected sensor reading defies current models. Biological? Geological? Artificial?

plot_threads.title: Systems Degradation
plot_threads.description: Cascading failures. Radiation damage. Micrometeoroid. Software fault. Time pressure.

plot_threads.title: The Corporate Secret
plot_threads.description: Mission profile changed. Hidden objective. Crew is expendable test subjects.

world_rules.rule: No FTL. No artificial gravity except rotation/acceleration. Light lag is real.
Delta-v budget is absolute. Every maneuver costs. Tyranny of rocket equation.
Humans need 1g, radiation shielding, 2000+ kcal, psychological support
world_rules.exceptions: Genetic mods / cybernetics exist but experimental

world_rules.rule: Light-speed delay. No real-time comms beyond Earth orbit. Autonomy required.

foreshadowing.content: Protagonist notices micro-vibration in hull - 'ship breathing' - actually early structural fatigue
AI logs 'unexplained sensor ghost' during calibration - dismissed as cosmic ray
